tool_args: CTE with avg_daily_mm, est_annual_mm, max_single_day_mm, pct_rainy_days per station; ranked wet and dry top 5
tool_result_summary: Piiholo (0115) appeared as #1 wettest with est_annual_mm = 616,588 -- obviously erroneous. Next wettest was Piihonua (0213) at 4,414mm/yr. Driest was Kawaihae (0254) at 353mm/yr.

tool_args: SELECT SUM(rainfall_mm) FILTER (WHERE rainfall_mm >= 7999), SUM(rainfall_mm) FILTER (WHERE rainfall_mm < 7999) FROM mv_daily_station_summary WHERE station_id = '0115'
tool_result_summary: Error contribution: 1,999,750mm from 7999-value days vs 5,427mm real rainfall. 99.7% of total rainfall at station 0115 is from sensor error codes.

tool_args: Re-ran CTE with WHERE station_id != '0115' to exclude sensor-error station
tool_result_summary: Corrected ranking: Piihonua (0213, 4414mm/yr) is wettest, Kawaihae (0254, 353mm/yr) is driest. 12.5x ratio. All 5 wettest windward, all 5 driest leeward.
